subcodes.first_line: O spiritual companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Jináb-i-Muhammad Khán hath penned a letter in utmost [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران جانی عبدالبهاء جناب محمد خان نامه ای مرقوم نموده اند و در نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
